name: Global Atomic Corporation
content: Global Atomic Corporation is a Canadian resource company focused on the development of the high-grade Dasa uranium project in Niger and the production of zinc concentrate from its recycling operations in Turkey. The Dasa Project is recognized as the highest-grade uranium deposit currently under development in Africa, with a long mine life and low operating costs. Additionally, the company's 49% interest in the Befesa Silvermet Turkey, S.L. joint venture provides cash flow through the recycling of Electric Arc Furnace Dust to produce high-grade zinc concentrate.
